# BUDS — Documentação Completa para LLMs

> Sistema de design da plataforma Bud. React 19 + TypeScript strict + CSS Modules. Web Components vanilla (Custom Elements + Shadow DOM). Conteúdo em PT-BR. Grid de 4px. Ícones Phosphor regular weight only.

---

## Regras Obrigatórias

1. **Tokens obrigatórios**: NUNCA usar hex, rgb, hsl, px ou font-family literal. Usar `var(--token)`.
2. **Cores semânticas**: Não escolher cor pela aparência — seguir o mapeamento semântico abaixo.
3. **Ícones**: APENAS `@phosphor-icons/react` 2.1, peso regular. Nunca bold, fill, light, thin, duotone.
4. **Font-label para controles**: Button, Input, Select usam `--font-label` (500). NUNCA `--font-body`.
5. **Grid 4px**: Todo espaçamento é múltiplo de 4px via tokens `--sp-*`.
6. **Conteúdo em PT-BR**: Labels, placeholders, mensagens em português brasileiro.

---

## Tokens de Design

### Cores

| Paleta | 50 | 100 | 200 | 300 | 400 | 500 | 600 | 700 | 800 | 900 | 950 |
|--------|-----|-----|-----|-----|-----|-----|-----|-----|-----|-----|-----|
| neutral | #fafafa | #f5f5f5 | #e5e5e5 | #d4d4d4 | #a1a1a1 | #737373 | #525252 | #404040 | #262626 | #171717 | #0a0a0a |
| caramel | #faf8f2 | #f9f7f0 | #f1edde | #eae3cd | #e1d9bb | #d9ceaa | #d0c49a | #c7b98a | #bdae7a | #a99656 | #75683d |
| orange | #ffefeb | #ffc5b4 | #ffac92 | #ff936f | #ff7b4c | #fd5f28 | #fa4405 | #d23a06 | #ab3007 | #852607 | #601c06 |
| green | #f7fee7 | #ecfcca | #d8f999 | — | #9ae600 | #7ccf00 | #5ea500 | #497d00 | #3c6300 | #35530e | #192e03 |
| red | #fef2f2 | #ffe2e2 | #ffc9c9 | #ffa2a2 | #ff6467 | #fb2c36 | #e7000b | #c10007 | #9f0712 | #82181a | #460809 |
| yellow | #fffbeb | #fef9c2 | #fff085 | #ffdf20 | #ffb900 | #fe9a00 | #e17100 | #bb4d00 | #973c00 | #7b3306 | #461901 |
| wine | #ffebf3 | #fdc9de | #fa94bc | #f55694 | #c60c54 | #a60c46 | #860b38 | #67092b | #510923 | #3c091b | #290713 |

Base: `--color-white: #ffffff`, `--color-neutral-0: #ffffff`

### Mapeamento Semântico de Cores

**Texto:**
- Primário: `--color-neutral-950` (títulos, corpo, labels)
- Secundário: `--color-neutral-500` (descrições, placeholders)
- Terciário: `--color-neutral-400` (desabilitado, hints)
- Invertido: `--color-white` (sobre fundos escuros)
- Link/Ação: `--color-orange-500`

**Superfícies:**
- Padrão: `--color-white` (page, cards, modais)
- Sutil: `--color-caramel-50` (hover, zebra, accordion headers)
- Elevada: `--color-neutral-100` (badges neutros, disabled inputs)
- Invertida: `--color-neutral-800` (toast dark, tooltips)

**Bordas:**
- Padrão: `--color-caramel-300` (inputs, cards, popovers)
- Sutil: `--color-caramel-200` (divisores internos)
- Hover: `--color-caramel-500`
- Foco: `--color-caramel-700`
- Focus ring: `--color-caramel-200` via `box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px`

**Feedback (padrão por status):**

| Status | Background | Borda | Ícone | Título | Badge | Dismiss | Dismiss hover |
|--------|-----------|-------|-------|--------|-------|---------|---------------|
| Sucesso | green-50 | green-200 | green-700 | green-900 | green-700 | green-400 | green-100 |
| Erro | red-50 | red-200 | red-700 | red-900 | red-700 | red-400 | red-100 |
| Alerta | yellow-50 | yellow-200 | yellow-700 | yellow-900 | yellow-700 | yellow-400 | yellow-100 |
| Info | neutral-50 | neutral-200 | neutral-600 | neutral-900 | neutral-700 | neutral-400 | neutral-100 |

### Tipografia

| Token | Fonte | Peso | Uso |
|-------|-------|------|-----|
| `--font-display` | Crimson Pro | 600 | Hero, marketing |
| `--font-heading` | Plus Jakarta Sans | 600-700 | Headings |
| `--font-body` | Inter | 400, 600 | Corpo de texto, parágrafos |
| `--font-label` | Inter | 500 | Botões, inputs, labels, controles |

Font sizes: `--text-xs` (12px), `--text-sm` (14px), `--text-md` (16px), `--text-lg` (20px), `--text-xl` (24px), `--text-2xl` (32px), `--text-3xl` (38px)

### Espaçamento (grid 4px)

| Token | Valor |
|-------|-------|
| `--sp-3xs` | 4px |
| `--sp-2xs` | 8px |
| `--sp-xs` | 12px |
| `--sp-sm` | 16px |
| `--sp-md` | 20px |
| `--sp-lg` | 24px |
| `--sp-xl` | 32px |
| `--sp-2xl` | 40px |
| `--sp-3xl` | 48px |
| `--sp-4xl` | 64px |

### Border Radius

`--radius-2xs` (4px), `--radius-xs` (6px), `--radius-sm` (8px), `--radius-md` (12px), `--radius-lg` (16px), `--radius-full` (9999px)

### Sombras (base warm brown)

- `--shadow-xs`: cards, popovers
- `--shadow-sm`: dropdowns, tooltips
- `--shadow-md`: modals
- `--shadow-lg`: drawers
- `--shadow-xl`: large overlays

---

## Componentes — Referência Rápida

### Button
- **React**: `<Button variant="primary" size="md" leftIcon={Plus}>Label</Button>`
- **HTML**: `<bud-button variant="primary" size="md" icon-left="plus">Label</bud-button>`
- **Props**: variant (primary|secondary|tertiary|danger), size (sm|md|lg), leftIcon/icon-left, rightIcon/icon-right, loading, disabled
- **Regra**: Padding do lado do ícone reduzido em 1 step (ajuste ótico)

### Input
- **React**: `<Input label="Email" size="md" placeholder="seu@email.com" />`
- **HTML**: `<bud-input label="Email" size="md" placeholder="seu@email.com"></bud-input>`
- **Props**: size (sm|md|lg), label, leftIcon/icon-left, rightIcon/icon-right, message, messageType/message-type (error|attention|success), disabled, placeholder
- **Regra**: `line-height: normal` para não cortar descendentes (ç, g, y)
- **Eventos WC**: `bud-input` (digitando), `bud-change` (blur)

### Textarea
- **React**: `<Textarea label="Mensagem" rows={4} />`
- **HTML**: `<bud-textarea label="Mensagem" rows="4"></bud-textarea>`
- **Props**: label, rows (default 4), message, messageType/message-type, disabled

### Select
- **React**: `<Select options={[{value:"a",label:"Alpha"}]} searchable />`
- **HTML**: `<bud-select options='[{"value":"a","label":"Alpha"}]' searchable></bud-select>`
- **Props**: options (array), value, searchable, searchPlaceholder/search-placeholder, size, label, placeholder, message, messageType/message-type
- **Eventos WC**: `bud-change` ({ value })

### Checkbox
- **React**: `<Checkbox label="Aceito" size="md" />`
- **HTML**: `<bud-checkbox label="Aceito" size="md"></bud-checkbox>`
- **Props**: size (sm|md), label, description, indeterminate, checked, disabled
- **Eventos WC**: `bud-change` ({ checked })

### Radio
- **React**: `<Radio name="plan" value="pro" label="Pro" />`
- **HTML**: `<bud-radio name="plan" value="pro" label="Pro"></bud-radio>`
- **Props**: size (sm|md), label, description, name, value, checked, disabled

### Toggle
- **React**: `<Toggle label="Notificações" />`
- **HTML**: `<bud-toggle label="Notificações"></bud-toggle>`
- **Props**: label, description, checked, disabled
- **Acessibilidade**: `role="switch"`

### Badge
- **React**: `<Badge color="success" leftIcon={Check}>OK</Badge>`
- **HTML**: `<bud-badge color="success" icon-left="check">OK</bud-badge>`
- **Props**: color (neutral|orange|wine|caramel|error|warning|success), size (sm|md|lg), leftIcon/icon-left, rightIcon/icon-right

### Avatar
- **React**: `<Avatar src="url" initials="JS" size="md" online />`
- **HTML**: `<bud-avatar src="url" initials="JS" size="md" online></bud-avatar>`
- **Props**: size (xs|sm|md|lg|xl|2xl), src, initials, alt, online, companyLogo/company-logo

### Alert
- **React**: `<Alert variant="success" title="Salvo" onDismiss={fn}>Desc</Alert>`
- **HTML**: `<bud-alert variant="success" title="Salvo" dismissible>Desc</bud-alert>`
- **Props**: variant (info|success|warning|error), title, onDismiss/dismissible, action/action-label
- **Eventos WC**: `bud-dismiss`, `bud-action`

### Card (Compound)
- **React**: `<Card padding="md" shadow><CardHeader title="T" /><CardBody>...</CardBody><CardFooter>...</CardFooter></Card>`
- **HTML**: `<bud-card padding="md" shadow><bud-card-header title="T"></bud-card-header><bud-card-body>...</bud-card-body><bud-card-footer>...</bud-card-footer></bud-card>`
- **Sub-componentes**: CardHeader, CardBody, CardFooter, CardDivider

### Modal (Compound)
- **React**: `<Modal open={open} onClose={fn} size="md"><ModalHeader title="T" onClose={fn} /><ModalBody>...</ModalBody><ModalFooter>...</ModalFooter></Modal>`
- **HTML**: `<bud-modal open size="md"><bud-modal-header title="T"></bud-modal-header><bud-modal-body>...</bud-modal-body><bud-modal-footer>...</bud-modal-footer></bud-modal>`
- **Comportamento**: Focus trap, ESC fecha, click overlay fecha, scroll lock
- **Eventos WC**: `bud-close`

### Drawer (Compound)
- **React**: `<Drawer open={open} onClose={fn} side="right" size="md">...</Drawer>`
- **HTML**: `<bud-drawer open side="right" size="md">...</bud-drawer>`
- **Props**: side (right|left), size (sm|md|lg)
- **Mobile**: Bottom sheet automático em ≤768px

### Tooltip
- **React**: `<Tooltip content="Help" placement="top"><Button>Hover</Button></Tooltip>`
- **HTML**: `<bud-tooltip content="Help" placement="top"><button>Hover</button></bud-tooltip>`
- **Props**: content, placement (top|bottom|left|right), delay (ms, default 200), disabled

### Toast
- **API global** (igual em React e HTML):
```
toast("Mensagem")
toast.success("Salvo!")
toast.error("Falha", { description: "Detalhes", action: { label: "Retry", onClick: fn } })
toast.warning("Atenção")
toast.black("Dark theme")
toast.dismiss() // remove todos
```
- **Setup React**: `<Toaster />` no root
- **Setup HTML**: `<bud-toaster></bud-toaster>` no body

### LoadingScreen
- **React**: `<LoadingScreen />` ou `<LoadingScreen message="Conectando..." />`
- **HTML**: `<bud-loading-screen></bud-loading-screen>` ou `<bud-loading-screen message="Conectando..."></bud-loading-screen>`
- Tela fullscreen com animação liquid fill no símbolo do Bud
- **Props**: message (default: "Carregando..."), className
- **Acessibilidade**: role="status", aria-label, respeita prefers-reduced-motion
- **Tokens**: background neutral-0, silhueta caramel-200, fill orange-500, label neutral-400
- **Animação**: fillSweep 1.8s clip-path sweep + pulse 1.8s opacity no label

### Skeleton
- **React**: `<SkeletonContainer><Skeleton variant="text" width={200} height={14} /></SkeletonContainer>`
- **HTML**: `<bud-skeleton-container><bud-skeleton variant="text" width="200" height="14"></bud-skeleton></bud-skeleton-container>`
- **SEMPRE** envolver em SkeletonContainer para acessibilidade (role="status" + sr-only text)
- **Variants**: text, circular, rectangular, rounded

### Accordion
- **React**: `<Accordion><AccordionItem title="Section 1">Content</AccordionItem></Accordion>`
- **HTML**: `<bud-accordion><bud-accordion-item title="Section 1">Content</bud-accordion-item></bud-accordion>`
- **Props item**: title, description, icon, disabled, open
- **Eventos WC**: `bud-toggle` ({ open })

### TabBar
- **React**: `<TabBar tabs={[{value:"a",label:"Tab A"}]} activeTab="a" onTabChange={fn} />`
- **HTML**: `<bud-tab-bar tabs='[{"value":"a","label":"Tab A"}]' active-tab="a"></bud-tab-bar>`
- **Teclado**: Arrow Left/Right, Home, End
- **Eventos WC**: `bud-change` ({ value })

### Pagination
- **React**: `<Pagination currentPage={3} totalPages={10} onPageChange={fn} />`
- **HTML**: `<bud-pagination current-page="3" total-pages="10"></bud-pagination>`
- **Eventos WC**: `bud-change` ({ page })

### Breadcrumb
- **React**: `<Breadcrumb items={[{label:"Home",href:"/"},{label:"Page"}]} current={1} />`
- **HTML**: `<bud-breadcrumb items='[{"label":"Home","href":"/"},{"label":"Page"}]' current="1"></bud-breadcrumb>`
- **Eventos WC**: `bud-navigate` ({ index })

### Table (Compound)
- **Sub-componentes**: Table, TableContent, TableHead, TableBody, TableRow, TableHeaderCell, TableCell
- **Props Table**: variant (divider|striped), elevated, bordered, selectable
- **Props HeaderCell**: sortable, sortDirection (asc|desc), align

### Sidebar (Compound)
- **Sub-componentes**: Sidebar, SidebarHeader, SidebarNav, SidebarGroup, SidebarItem, SidebarDivider, SidebarFooter
- **Props Sidebar**: collapsed, mobileOpen/mobile-open
- **Collapsed**: 56px, labels hidden, flyout on hover
- **Mobile (≤768px)**: Drawer lateral com overlay

### Charts (SVG puro, sem Recharts)
- **Chart gauge**: `<Chart value={75} variant="full" size={40} />` / `<bud-chart value="75" size="40"></bud-chart>`
- **Sparkline**: `<Sparkline data={[10,20,15]} color="orange" />` / `<bud-sparkline data="[10,20,15]" color="orange"></bud-sparkline>`
- **Heatmap**: Grid de intensidade com 5 steps de cor
- **Radar**: Gráfico spider com grid concêntrico
- **Funnel**: Trapezóides com labels e porcentagem

### Outros Componentes
- **Popover**: Menu de contexto com items JSON, keyboard nav, submenu
- **DropdownButton**: Botão + dropdown menu searchable
- **DatePicker**: Calendário com input mascarado DD/MM/AAAA
- **ScaleInput**: Escala numérica (0-10) com keyboard nav
- **ChoiceBox**: Cards selecionáveis single/multi
- **FilterBar + FilterChip**: Barra de filtros com chips dinâmicos
- **SortableList**: Lista reordenável drag-and-drop + teclado (Alt+Setas)
- **PopoverSelect**: Seleção com avatar, busca, criação inline
- **GoalProgress**: Barra de progresso com meta e status (on-track/attention/off-track)
- **PageHeader**: Header de página com título e ações

---

## Instalação

### React
```bash
npm install @getbud-co/buds @phosphor-icons/react
npm install @fontsource/inter @fontsource/plus-jakarta-sans @fontsource/crimson-pro
```

```tsx
// main.tsx
import "@fontsource/inter/400.css";
import "@fontsource/inter/500.css";
import "@fontsource/inter/600.css";
import "@fontsource/plus-jakarta-sans/600.css";
import "@fontsource/plus-jakarta-sans/700.css";
import "@fontsource/crimson-pro/600.css";
import "@getbud-co/buds/styles";
```

### HTML (Web Components)
```bash
npm install @getbud-co/buds-vanilla
```

```html
<link rel="stylesheet" href="buds.css" />
<script type="module" src="buds.js"></script>
```

Todos os custom elements são registrados automaticamente. Sem build tools necessário.

### Eventos Web Components
Todos usam `CustomEvent` com `bubbles: true` e `composed: true` (cruzam Shadow DOM):
- `bud-change` — input, textarea, select, checkbox, radio, toggle, tab-bar, pagination
- `bud-input` — input, textarea (durante digitação)
- `bud-close` — modal, drawer, alert, popover, sidebar
- `bud-dismiss` — alert
- `bud-action` — alert
- `bud-navigate` — breadcrumb
- `bud-select` — popover, dropdown-button
- `bud-toggle` — accordion
- `bud-sort` — table header cell
- `bud-click` — sidebar item, filter chip
- `bud-remove` — filter chip

### Form Participation
Controles de formulário (input, textarea, checkbox, radio, toggle, select, date-picker) usam `ElementInternals` para participação nativa em `<form>`. Funcionam com `FormData`, validação e `form.reset()`.
